悪魔デザイン：押山清高

3DCGディレクター：山内智史／玉井真広

制作：MAPPA

蜘蛛の悪魔：後藤沙緒里

■公式X：@CHAINSAWMAN_PR（https://twitter.com/ CHAINSAWMAN_PR）

trending_videos.title: SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY – New Trailer (4K)
trending_videos.description:
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn't forgotten them. 

Watch the new trailer for #SpiderManBrandNewDay, in theatres July 31. Tickets on sale NOW.

July 31, 2026

It's a BRAND NEW DAY for Peter Parker. Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn’t remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see.
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn’t forgotten them.

Directed by:   
Destin Daniel Cretton   
 
Written by: 
Chris McKenna & Erik Sommers and Justin Kuritzkes
   
Based on the MARVEL Comic Book by: 
Stan Lee and Steve Ditko

Produced by:      
Kevin Feige, p.g.a.
Amy Pascal, p.g.a.   
Avi Arad
Rachel O'Connor, p.g.a.

Executive Producers:    
Louis D'Esposito 
David Cain

Cast:  
Tom Holland

entertainment.description: The majority of the videos fall under the entertainment category, showcasing trailers, gameplay, and series teasers.
examples: SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY – New Trailer (4K)
Outer Banks: Season 5 | Official Teaser | Netflix
Grand Theft Auto VI: Official Cover Art Reveal
entertainment.insight: There is a strong consumer interest in new releases and announcements in popular franchises like Spider-Man, Grand Theft Auto, and Chainsaw Man.

gaming.description: Gaming content is highly prevalent, with both gameplay and reaction videos.
examples: Fall asleep while I build a zoo (Part 2)
FlightReacts To NEW GTA 6 Cover Trailer
I Got Hunted By a Minecraft Combat Master
gaming.insight: Gaming content remains a staple, particularly with the inclusion of popular titles and interactive formats like reaction and breakdown videos.

animation.description: Animated content is featured, particularly with anime and digital circus themes.
examples: 『チェンソーマン 刺客篇』ティザーPV②
animation.insight: Anime and animated series continue to capture significant viewer interest, pointing to opportunities in these niches.

diversity_of_content.description: Channels are producing a variety of content types, from trailers and teasers to gameplay and analysis.
examples: MAPPA CHANNEL with Chainsaw Man teaser
Sony Pictures Entertainment with Spider-Man trailer
New Rockstars with detailed trailer breakdowns
diversity_of_content.insight: Successful channels often diversify their content to include both official releases and analytical or interactive formats, catering to different audience interests.

cross-media engagement.description: Channels like New Rockstars and FlightReacts engage audiences through detailed breakdowns and reactions, enhancing viewer engagement with interactive content.
cross-media engagement.insight: Creating content that encourages viewer interaction, such as breakdowns and reactions, can increase engagement and loyalty among audiences.

emerging_themes.description: There is a strong viewer interest in upcoming series, game reveals, and in-depth content analysis.
opportunities: Develop content around upcoming game and movie releases to capture early interest and engagement.
Leverage analysis and breakdown formats to offer unique insights into popular media, enhancing viewer understanding and engagement.

niche_markets.description: Anime and digital animation content are showing strong engagement.
opportunities: Create content focusing on niche markets like anime and digital animations, which are currently trending.
Collaborate with creators or platforms specializing in these niches to expand reach and influence.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
